zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter De Clopton於大約1298年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親William De Colpton III50歲，母親Elizabeth de Pygott42歲。他於大約1319年與Alice Fitzhugh在英國英格蘭素福爾可肯特維爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1337年在英國素福爾可波斯林福德享年41歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可波斯林福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter De Clopton于大约1298年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲William De Colpton III50岁，母亲Elizabeth de Pygott42岁。他于大约1319年与Alice Fitzhugh在英国英格兰素福爾可肯特維爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1337年在英国素福爾可波斯林福德享年41岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可波斯林福德。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter De Clopton was born about 1298, in Suffolk, England, his father, William De Colpton III, was 50 and his mother, Elizabeth de Pygott, was 42. He married Alice Fitzhugh about 1319, in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1337, in Poslingford, Suffolk, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Poslingford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter De Clopton est né environ 1298, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William De Colpton III, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Pygott, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Alice Fitzhugh environ 1319, à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1337, à Poslingford, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Poslingford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter De Clopton um 1298 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Colpton III 50 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Pygott 42. Er hat um 1319 in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Alice Fitzhugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1337 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Poslingford, Suffolk, England und wurde in Poslingford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter De Clopton è nato il circa 1298 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William De Colpton III, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Pygott, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Alice Fitzhugh circa 1319, nel Kentwell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1337, nel Poslingford, Suffolk, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Poslingford, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter De Cloptonが約1298年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父William De Colpton IIIは50歳，母Elizabeth de Pygottは42歳であった。約1319年にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントウエルでAlice Fitzhughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1337年にイギリススフォルクポスリングフォードで41歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクポスリングフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter De Clopton(이)가 대략 1298년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Colpton III(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Pygott(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1319년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄트웰에서 Alice Fitzhugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1337년 영국 수폴크 포슬링퍼드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 포슬링퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter De Clopton nasceu aproximadamente 1298, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Colpton III, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Pygott, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Fitzhugh aproximadamente 1319, em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1337, em Poslingford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Poslingford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Long Melford, Suffolk, England: Long Melford, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter De Clopton родился около 1298 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Colpton III было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Pygott, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Fitzhugh около 1319 г. в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1337 г. в местности послингфорд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности послингфорд, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Fitzhugh aproximadamente 1319, en Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1337, en Poslingford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Poslingford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
